remember: Students will be able to recall and list different types of accounting ratios.
Students will be able to identify the formula and calculate various accounting ratios.
Students will be able to differentiate between various accounting ratios and their uses.
understand: Students will be able to understand the concept and importance of accounting ratios in financial analysis.
Students will be able to explain the significance of accounting ratios in decision-making.
Students will be able to comprehend how accounting ratios help in comparing the profitability and efficiency of a company.
apply: Students will be able to apply the formulas to calculate various accounting ratios.
Students will be able to analyze the financial data of a company and interpret the accounting ratios.
Students will be able to use accounting ratios to compare the performance of two or more companies.
analyze: Students will be able to analyze the strengths and weaknesses of a company based on its accounting ratios.
Students will be able to interpret the trends and changes in accounting ratios over a period of time.
Students will be able to use accounting ratios to identify areas of improvement in a company's performance.

ncert_objectives: To understand the concept and importance of accounting ratios.
To calculate and interpret various types of accounting ratios.
To analyze the financial data of a company and interpret the accounting ratios.
board_exam_objectives: To calculate and interpret various accounting ratios such as Current Ratio, Debt-Equity Ratio, Return on Equity (ROE), etc.
To analyze the financial data of a company and interpret the accounting ratios to compare its performance with industry standards.
To understand the significance of accounting ratios in decision-making and apply them to real-life scenarios.
